action_set_definitions.name: get_fleet_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status, location, and assigned route for specific vehicles or all vehicles in the fleet.

vehicle_ids.description: Optional list of vehicle IDs to query. If empty, returns status for all vehicles.

action_set_definitions.name: check_maintenance_holds
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the OCC (Operations Control Center) database for administrative maintenance holds on specific vehicle records. Required before CAD/AVL updates.

vehicle_id.description: The unique identifier of the vehicle to check.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_maintenance_hold
action_set_definitions.description: Resolves or clears an administrative maintenance hold on a vehicle record to allow synchronization with the CAD/AVL system.

vehicle_id.description: The unique identifier of the vehicle.

resolution_code.description: The protocol code for clearing the hold (e.g., 'SYNC_AUTH', 'MAINT_ACK').

action_set_definitions.name: set_rtpi_visibility
action_set_definitions.description: Configures the public-facing Real-Time Passenger Information (RTPI) feed visibility for a vehicle.

vehicle_id.description: The unique identifier of the vehicle.

suppress_countdown.description: Set to true to hide the vehicle's arrival predictions from public feeds.

action_set_definitions.name: update_cad_avl_assignment
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the Computer-Aided Dispatch/Automatic Vehicle Location (CAD/AVL) system to assign a vehicle to a specific route, direction, and schedule block.

target_route.description: The route name or ID (e.g., 'Route 10 Blue Line').

state_description.sim_clock: The current simulation time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).
state_description.fleet_status: A mapping of vehicle IDs to their current route, coordinates/stop, and delay status in minutes.
state_description.active_disruptions: A list of current incidents (e.g., accidents, road closures) affecting the network, including location and severity.
state_description.passenger_loads: Crowding levels at key transit hubs or on specific routes (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High').
state_description.crew_availability: Status of standby drivers or staff available for emergency schedule recovery.

active_disruptions.description: Vehicle 202 has a pneumatic leak; Northbound lane blocked.
